content: What makes recruiters/hiring managers stop scrolling: first 6-8 seconds decide; a distinct human hero (vs generic template) keeps them; top 3 projects with role+stack must be visible above the fold; specific metrics beat vague claims; broken links or slow load = instant bounce (3s load is an anti-signal); overly complex/confusing navigation costs evaluation time and counts against the candidate; authentic original projects (not tutorial clones) read as credible.
